name: FOX
description:
A brave-hearted veteran who fought as a rebel during the Titan Wars. He stands for the people, and for all those he’s lost.

PROJECT A.T.L.A.S. | Prologue

The impact changed everything.

Before, humanity balanced itself on the edge of a knife - one step away from shedding its own blood. A division instigated by patrons of true chaos had separated the most powerful of us into their own tribes, and it was only a matter of time before one of them broke the silence.

But after the Awakening, the world as we knew it would never return to the way it once was.

The collision forced a unity between borders; a hard reset for society as a whole. And from that unity, Monolith was born, with a promise to protect us from ‘them’ - those who rewrote the rules that our reality was once built upon. Yet, in their pursuit of order, they lost their direction, and plunged humanity back into the cycle it was doomed to repeat; this time, against a single common enemy.

Some argue that the Awakening changed the world for the better, and that the wars that followed cleansed mankind of its own inhibition. I think it paved the way for something even uglier. And as the years went on, we realized the truth: the real enemy wasn't just those who wielded power, but the weight of our own fear, the weight of what we had lost - and what we had become.

30 years after the impact, as we live in illusions of peace, that weight hangs even heavier.

Somebody has to bear it all. Someone has to bring about a new change.

Will it be you?
creator: lexxx0902
